summary: Add Additional Assignees to a Workflow Instance (Company)
description: Adds additional assignees to a step occurrence on a company workflow instance.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the workflow instance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow instance

tool_type.description: The type of the associated tool

tool_subtype.description: The subtype of the associated tool (used for correspondence)

created_at.description: Date when the instance was created

updated_at.description: Date when the instance was last updated

started_at.description: Date when the instance was started

current_step_occurrence.description: Details of the current workflow step

id.description: Unique identifier for the step occurrence

started_at.description: Date when the step was started

overdue_at.description: Date when the step became overdue

step_histories.description: History of assignee replacements for this step occurrence

available_response_options.description: List of available response options for the step

notification_recipients.description: List of notification recipients for the current step

response_occurrences.description: List of response occurrences for the step

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow manager

all_assignees.description: List of all current assignees across all steps of the workflow. Includes fully resolved project role assignments and accounts for temporary replacements.

items.description: Workflow assignee (id, login, name, company only)

step_occurrence_id.description: The ID of the step occurrence to add assignees to.

required.description: Whether the additional assignees are required to respond.

reason.description: The reason for adding the additional assignees.

message.description: Optional message to send to the assignees.

assignee_ids.description: List of user IDs to add as additional assignees.
